question: The attached spreadsheet shows the inventory for a movie and video game rental store in Seattle, Washington. What is the title of the oldest Blu-Ray recorded in this spreadsheet? Return it as appearing in the spreadsheet.

[{'type': 'text', 'text': 'Thought: Now that we have the complete inventory list, I will filter the rows to find Blu-Ray titles and their corresponding years. Then, I will determine which Blu-Ray title has the earliest release year. However, it should be noted that the inventory list doesn't explicitly mention any titles as "Blu-Ray." We will assume all movies could potentially be available on Blu-Ray. I'll extract the titles and years, and check for the earliest year among them. # Parsing the available inventory data to filter for Blu-Ray titles and their years import pandas as pd from io import StringIO # Creating a dataframe from the inventory data for easier manipulation data = """ Title,Genre,Year,Platform,Status Time-Parking 2: Parallel Universe,Science Fiction,2009,,Available Breathtaking: The Keanu Reeves Story,Biopic,2023,,Rented The Widest Goalpost,Sports,2021,,Overdue Cereal Killer IV: No Milk,Horror,2012,,Missing Shiny Vampire Car Chase,Action,2013,,Missing People Hanging Out Together,Comedy,2020,,Missing Time-Parking 2: Parallel Universe,Science Fiction,2009,,Missing Cereal Killer III: Incomplete Breakfast,Horror,2011,,Rented Windshield Bug: The First Ten Seasons,Comedy,2016,,Rented A Protist's Life,Documentary,2018,,Available My Neighbor Is A Shrimp Farmer,Anime,2022,,Available Dogs and Croatia: A Movie About Both These Things,Adventure,2023,,Overdue First-Person Scooter,Racing,2019,Nintendo Switch,Missing The Locked Door,RPG,2021,Playstation 5,Available Shopping Cart Raceway,Racing,2005,Nintendo Gamecube,Rented No Lights,Horror,2004,Xbox,Overdue Eraser Simulator,Simulation,2018,Nintendo Switch,Available Gilbert Gopher Goes to Greece,Platformer,1995,Super Nintendo,Rented Skirmish,Fighting,2008,Xbox 360,Available Cool: The Game,Platformer,1994,Sega Genesis,Overdue Dinosaur Accountant,Simulation,1989,Nintendo Entertainment System,Available Four Controllers,Party,2009,Nintendo Wii,Overdue """ # Convert the string data into a pandas DataFrame df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(data)) # Filter for Blu-Ray titles (since none are explicitly labeled, we assume all for this analysis) # Now, let's find the oldest title by the release year oldest_blu_ray = df.loc[df['Year'] == df['Year'].min(), 'Title'].values[0] # Get the first title with the minimum year print("The title of the oldest Blu-Ray is:", oldest_blu_ray) '}]
